series_metadata.series_title: STEWARDS OR JUDGES DAILY REPORTS AND RULINGS
series_metadata.series_description: Contains Stewards and Judges rulings and daily reports at all tracks.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Current year and two previous years retained and then destroy, except in cases of expulsion or long suspension still in effect, which items are transferred to the hearing files. ; Electronic: Current year and two previous years retained and then destroy, except in cases of expulsion or long suspension still in effect, which items are transferred to the hearing files., Paper: Recycle ; Electronic: Delete
